pi_items.source: export_result.sh and task instructions explicitly require this title
verifier.py checks for the presence of '$:/temp/NewPatient' in the output tiddler
verifier.py specifically checks if all these fields are present in the output text

privileged_info_summary: The expected tiddler title is confirmed to be 'New Patient Registration Form' via export_result.sh. The evaluation scripts verifier.py verify that the generated form must use the exact state tiddler '$:/temp/NewPatient' and include input fields matching 'patient_name', 'dob', and 'physician'. The dummy patient data generated for context is completely synthetic.
